title: Tensura: Craftables
description: Adds custom recipes for quality of life improvements to Tensura: Reincarnated and one of its addons - Mysticism
body:
This datapack adds custom recipes and other usages of items from the mod Tensura: Reincarnated and Tensura: Mysticism.

**Tensura: Reincarnated**

**Crafting recipes:**
- Marionette Heart
